cross_scene_arcs.title: Rebellion Against Confinement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jen expresses longing for freedom, bonds with Yu over dissatisfaction with constraints, flees her arranged marriage, publicly rebels as a sword goddess, and breaks ties with Yu after confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dissatisfied with impending arranged marriage, dreaming of freedom.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Fugitive, rejecting societal and familial authority, isolated.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her safety and future as a fugitive.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Entanglement with Lo
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jen reunites with Lo, experiences passion and conflict, exchanges tokens of affection, ends the relationship, and has a final interaction where she disappears after a shared wish.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Reunited with former lover Lo, emotionally vulnerable.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Disappears into clouds, leaving Lo tearful yet smiling.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The meaning of her disappearance and the promise of reunion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Martial Prowess and Ethical Shift
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jen reveals superior martial skills by defeating Jade Fox, declares herself a goddess in public rampages, but later uses her knowledge to identify poison and aid in saving Li Mu Bai.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Concealing skills under Jade Fox's mentorship.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Publicly assertive, transitioning towards responsible use of abilities.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her ultimate role in the martial world and potential redemption.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Attack to Caretaking
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lo leads a bandit attack on Jen's caravan and takes her comb, but later offers her bath and clean clothes, softening their initial hostility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lo as bandit leader Dark Cloud attacking Jen.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Relationship softened after Jen accepts Lo's care.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jen's armed stance after the bandits escape.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Violent Argument to Love Declaration
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lo and Jen's dispute over the comb escalates to violence and then intimacy, followed by Lo sharing his orphan past and declaring his love and commitment to her.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lo has declared love and vowed to earn Jen's parents' respect.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Lo can fulfill his promise to earn her parents' respect.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Comb as Token and Rejection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jen gives Lo her jade comb as a token for safekeeping with a promise of reunion, but later rejects him, and he gives her a comb before fleeing her room.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lo possesses Jen's jade comb with a promise to keep it safe.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lo flees after verbal rejection, leaving Jen with a comb.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The significance of the comb and Lo's whereabouts after fleeing.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Dejection to Wishful Acceptance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dejected and hunted, Lo is persuaded to seek refuge in Wudan, reunites with Jen at the temple, shares intimacy, but wakes to find her gone, and finally watches her leap into the clouds after making a wish to return to the desert together.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lo dejected and hunted, agreeing to go to Wudan.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lo alone on the bridge, smiling with tears after Jen disappears.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Lo's wish to be back in the desert with Jen will come true.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Yu and Li Mu Bai's Romantic Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Yu learns of Li Mu Bai's arrival, invites him to Peking, faces external criticism about their unspoken feelings, reunites with him, confesses love, and loses him to poison.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Yu is packing for a convoy when she learns Li Mu Bai has arrived.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Li Mu Bai dies in Yu's arms after they acknowledge their feelings.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Yu will cope with Li Mu Bai's death and the unresolved tensions of their world.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Yu's Bond with Jen from Sisterhood to Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Yu establishes trust with Jen as a fighter, forms a sisterly bond, disowns her after the sword theft, temporarily allies to save Li Mu Bai, and spares her with advice.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Yu explains fighter rules to Jen and begins a mentor-like relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Yu spares Jen and advises her to go to Wudan Mountain and be true to herself.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Jen will follow Yu's advice and find her own path.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Yu's Duty and the Green Destiny Sword
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Yu is involved in Li Mu Bai's plan to deliver the sword to Sir Te, responds to its theft, pursues the thief, manages the crisis when Li is poisoned, and ensures the sword's return.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Yu invites Li Mu Bai to Peking to deliver the sword to Sir Te.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Yu sends the Green Destiny back to Sir Te with Bo after Li Mu Bai's death.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The sword is returned, but at significant personal cost to Yu.
